title: LittleTilesImportOld
description: An addon for LittleTiles to load old worlds from 1.12 and prior
body: Requires [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) and [LittleTiles](https://modrinth.com/mod/littletiles) This mod is an addon for LittleTiles and allows you to open worlds populated with LittleTiles from 1.12 and prior versions. All you need to do is to keep this mod installed. All loaded chunks will be converted. It is recommended to remove this mod once the entire world has been converted, but before the removal make sure all chunks have loaded at least once. [![LittleTiles.net (Banner)](https://i.imgur.com/kFHq62N.png)](https://littletiles.net/) Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers!
